description: Shared Weft conformance vector for the Wardline->legis signed scan-artifact wire contract. The PRODUCER (wardline core/legis.py) and every CONSUMER (legis wardline/ingest.py) load this SAME file in CI. A rename on either side that drifts the wire shape fails a vector here instead of silently breaking the cross-member defect flow. Root cause #2 of the Weft incident 2026-06-10: hand-transcribed contracts with no shared test. Covers G1 (findings-key presence) and the G1 twin (kind-value vocabulary).

signing.covers: canonical_json(artifact MINUS the 'artifact_signature' key) — ensure_ascii=False, sorted keys, compact (",",":") separators, then HMAC-SHA256 hex prefixed 'hmac-sha256:v2:'
signing.note: expected_signature pins the byte-exact cross-impl HMAC. If either side's canonical-JSON+HMAC formula diverges, the signature stops reproducing here — caught in CI, never in prod. The hex is identical to wardline's golden (wardline/tests/unit/core/test_legis_artifact.py).

valid.name: golden_single_active_defect
valid.description: The authoritative signed golden: one active defect. A consumer's signer MUST reproduce expected_signature byte-for-byte; active_defects selects exactly this finding.

valid.name: clean_scan_empty_findings
valid.description: G1 over-correction guard: a genuinely clean scan carries findings:[] (key PRESENT, list empty) and ingests cleanly with zero active defects — it must NOT be confused with the absent-key drift case.

valid.name: known_non_defect_kinds_are_excluded
valid.description: G1 twin over-correction guard: every known NON-defect kind is legitimately not in the gate population — skipped, never rejected.

invalid.name: absent_findings_key
invalid.description: G1: no findings key at all is drift/tamper (a rename leaves it absent). Must reject — never read as zero defects under a green status.

invalid.name: renamed_findings_key
invalid.description: G1: a real CRITICAL defect arrives under a renamed batch key. The consumer must reject the payload, not route zero defects.

invalid.name: drifted_defect_kind_value
invalid.description: G1 twin (value axis): a defect whose kind token drifted out of the Wardline vocabulary (e.g. 'defect'->'vulnerability', re-signed HMAC-clean) must be LOUD, never silently skipped out of the gate population.

invalid.name: unknown_suppression_state
invalid.description: A defect carrying an out-of-vocabulary suppression_state is malformed and rejected.

invalid.name: waived_defect_without_proof
invalid.description: An agent-initiated waiver with no suppression proof anywhere is rejected — an agent must not be able to silently dismiss a defect.
